good.text: Third-party ad tracking is limited or can be turned off.
Children's data gets extra protection or isn't collected.

bad.text: They can change the terms at any time without telling you.
They take a broad, perpetual, sublicensable license to your content.
They can suspend or close your account at any time, for any reason.
Their liability to you is capped at almost nothing.
The service is provided 'as is' with no guarantees.

clauses.label: Silent Term Changes
clauses.summary: The company can modify the terms at any time and those changes become binding after 10 days of posting, with continued use counting as acceptance.

clauses.label: Broad Content License
clauses.summary: By posting, you give the company a worldwide, royalty‑free, non‑exclusive license to use and distribute your content, and for public content you also grant other users a perpetual, irrevocable license.

clauses.summary: The company can suspend or terminate your access to the services at any time, for any reason, and without notice.

clauses.label: Broad Content License
clauses.summary: You give the company a perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, royalty‑free license to use any feedback you provide, allowing them to commercialize it without further permission.

clauses.label: Liability Capped
clauses.summary: The clause caps the company’s and related parties’ liability to the amount you paid in the past year (or $50 for free services) and disclaims many types of damages, making the company less financially responsible for issues.

You also represent and warrant that you will not knowingly provide misleading information to support your claim. Open Source. clauses.label: No Warranties
clauses.summary: The company states that the services are provided "as is" without any warranties, meaning they are not liable for errors, availability, or any damages you may suffer from using the service.
clauses.excerpt: In this regard, we make no warranties or representations about these Services. clauses.label: Limited Tracking
clauses.summary: The company says it respects Do Not Track signals and will not use cookies or advertising when those signals are present, and it does not sell personal data to third parties for advertising without consent.
clauses.excerpt: 370, amending the California Online Privacy Protection Act to require website operators to disclose how they respond to "Do Not Track Signals"; and whether third parties collect personally identifiable information about users when they use online services. The Company honors "do not track" signals and does not track, use cookies, or use advertising when a “do not track” mechanism is in place. The Company does not authorize the collection of personally identifiable information from our users for third party use through advertising technologies without separate member consent. clauses.label: Children Protected
clauses.summary: The clause says the service is not aimed at children under 13, does not intend to collect their data, and will delete any such data if collected without parental consent.
clauses.excerpt: If you have any questions about security, you can contact the Company at privacy@huggingface.co.
